entity.label: Anem
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Two fountains, a Levitical city in the tribe of Issachar (1 Chr. 6:73). It is also called En-gannim (q.v.) in Josh. 19:21; the modern Jenin.

nodes.label: Anem
nodes.description: Two fountains, a Levitical city in the tribe of Issachar (1 Chr. 6:73). It is also called En-gannim (q.v.) in Josh. 19:21; the modern Jenin.

verses.text: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:
